texto: Assaulted as we are with so many advertisements, messages, appeals, theories, and obligations, we are in danger of losing our way, if not our sanity.We must choose just those few things that we really value. If we filter out the rest and focus on these, we can regain our perspective, and our happiness.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Russell Evans sobre temas ligados a felicidade. A afirmação “Assaulted as we are with so many advertisements, messages, appeals, theories, and obligations, we…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a felicidade, happiness, life-lessons, útil em momentos de life-lessons e moments.
